implemented.summary: Added a deterministic delivered-status rule for observed on-time performance has_metric relations. The rule is scoped to entity/route/corridor subjects already allowed by the parent metric relation path, metric_claim objects, same-source evidence, concrete numeric values, observed period anchors, exact OTP metric-name allowlist, percentage/percent units, and future/proposed/forecast/estimate rejection guards while allowing observed above-goal text.

verification.details: Materialized 93092/98102 submissions; SQLite FTS quick_check: ok
Submissions 98102; canonical records 84040; wiki pages 7334; Issues 0

intentionally_unresolved: OTP-shaped rows without observed period anchors remain unknown.
Project on-time-performance, on-time-performance change, wrong-unit rows, missing-evidence rows, and future/proposed/forecast/estimate rows remain unknown.
The rule intentionally does not generalize to all performance percentages, customer satisfaction, ridership recovery, service delivered, or travel-time metrics.
No canonical JSONL was hand-edited; canonical relations and SQLite were refreshed by deterministic materialization.
